UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public profile information.

rating.description: The user's ELO rating for ranked matches. Defaults to 1000.

lastMatchDate.description: The timestamp of the user's last completed match.

guildId.description: The ID of the guild the user belongs to.

Card.title: Card
Card.description: Represents a single card in the trading card game.

theme.description: The theme of the card (e.g., fantasy, sci-fi).

manaCost.description: The mana cost to play the card.

attack.description: The attack power of the card (for creatures).

defense.description: The defense/health of the card (for creatures).

abilities.description: The special abilities or rules text of the card.

flavorText.description: The thematic or story text of the card.

imageUrl.description: The URL for the card's artwork.

imageHint.description: A hint for generating the card's image.

frameImageUrl.description: The URL for the card's custom frame.

Game.title: Game
Game.description: Represents the state of an online card game session.

status.description: The current status of the game.

player1Id.description: The UID of the first player.

player2Id.description: The UID of the second player.

activePlayerId.description: The UID of the player whose turn it is.

winnerId.description: The UID of the winning player, if the game is finished.

lastAction.description: A description of the last action taken.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the game was created.

TradeOffer.title: Trade Offer
TradeOffer.description: Represents a trade offer between two users.

offerorId.description: The UID of the user making the offer.

offerorLoginId.description: The login ID of the offeror.

offereeId.description: The UID of the user receiving the offer.

offereeLoginId.description: The login ID of the offeree.

description.description: A short description of the guild.

leaderId.description: The UID of the user who created the guild.

memberIds.description: A list of UIDs of the guild members.

activityTime.description: The typical activity time for the guild.

genderRatio.description: The gender ratio of the guild.

notes.description: Additional notes or rules for the guild.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message in a guild chat.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information about a user, like their display name and rating.

rules.description: Users can read their own profile and all profiles for ranking purposes.
Users can only create or update their own profile.

/games/{gameId}.description: Stores individual game sessions for online battles.

rules.description: Authenticated users can read, create and update games.
Authenticated users can create trade offers.
Users can read trade offers they are involved in.
The offeree can accept or reject a pending offer.
rules.if: request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.offereeId && resource.data.status == 'pending' && (request.resource.data.status == 'accepted' || request.resource.data.status == 'rejected')

rules.description: The offeror can cancel a pending offer.
rules.if: request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.offerorId && resource.data.status == 'pending' && request.resource.data.status == 'cancelled'

/guilds/{guildId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores chat messages for a guild.
